message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate string formatting methods to withInlineBlock

Migrated all string formatting method generators:
- genLstrip, genRstrip - trim leading/trailing whitespace
- genCapitalize, genTitle, genSwapcase - case transformations
- genIndex, genRfind, genRindex - search with start/end bounds
- genLjust, genRjust, genCenter - padding/alignment
- genZfill - zero-padding

All use callback pattern with Ctx structs for context passing.
Reduces emitInlineBlockStart occurrences from 60 to 48.
